products.title: Monitor BenQ XL-K Series XL2411K led 24
products.description: 144Hz refresh rate performance for a smooth gaming experience. Supports 120Hz gaming on consoles (PS5 & Xbox Series X). Dynamic Accuracy technology makes vigorous in-game actions such as spraying less blur. Smaller base takes up less space, allowing gamer more space in their set-up for in-game movements. Increased height adjustment range and free tilt design provides more flexibility based on your personal preference

products.title: Monitor curved Asus TUF Gaming VG24VQ led 23.6
products.description: 23.6-inch Full HD (1920 x 1080) 1500R gaming monitor with ultra-fast 165Hz refresh rate (supports 144Hz) designed for professional gamers and immersive gaming

products.title: Monitor gamer LG 24GL600F led 23.6
products.description: Expand your limits and take yo  ur level of play further. The 24 LG UltraGear monitor allows you to view your game at 144Hz/s with a response time of 1Ms. Includes FreeSync.

products.title: Webcam Logitech Pro C920 1080p Full Hd
products.description: C920s delivers remarkably crisp and detailed Full HD video (1080p at 30fps) with a full HD glass lens, 78° field of view, and HD auto light correction—plus dual mics for clear stereo sound. Everything you need to look great in conference calls and record polished demos. The attachable privacy shutter protects the lens and keeps your privacy when you need it.

products.title: Webcam Hd Logitech C930e 1080p Full Hd
products.description: C930e is an advanced HD 1080p webcam that delivers high-resolution video in virtually any environment, including low-light and harshly backlit settings. H.264 video compression and a generously wide 90° field of view help make C930e the next best thing to being there in person.

products.title: Webcam Logitech Stream Cam Plus 1080p
products.description: Logitech StreamCam streams and records in full HD 1080p resolution at 60 fps, delivering stunning video content with smooth motion to every aspect of your online world. From recording YouTube videos to streaming on Twitch and beyond, StreamCams premium glass lens and smart auto-focus system make it easy to get professional-quality results. Advanced features like auto-framing and intelligent exposure ensure you always look your best in any lighting

products.title: Webcam Logitech C922 Pro Stream Full Hd
products.description: Connect with superior clarity every time you go live on channels like Twitch and YouTube. Stream anything you want in your choice of Full 1080p at 30fps or hyperfast HD 720p at 60fps. Broadcast masterfully with reliable no-drop audio, autofocus, and a 78° diagonal field of view. Includes free 3-month premium XSplit license.

products.title: Razer Huntsman Mini Optical Red Linear Switch Gaming Keyboard
products.description: Dominate on a different scale with the Razer Huntsman Mini a 60% gaming keyboard with cutting-edge Razer Optical Switches. Highly portable and ideal for streamlined setups, it is time to experience lightning-fast actuation in our most compact form factor yet.

products.title: Razer Cynosa V2 - Membrane Gaming Keyboard RGB
products.description: Paint your play in a truly immersive light with the Razer Cynosa V2—the essential RGB gaming keyboard. With customizable lighting in every key, watch it come alive as you game on Chroma-integrated titles, and embrace a gaming experience you wont ever want to turn away from.

products.title: Razer BlackWidow V3 Pro QWERTY RGB
products.description: Feel the difference with the Razer BlackWidow V3—backed by a legacy as the first and most iconic mechanical gaming keyboard, and armed with new, improved features including our world-renowned switches.

products.title: Logitech G Pro Mechanical Gaming Keyboard RGB
products.description: Featuring the fastest and most durable Romer-G switches in a compact and ultra-portable ten keyless design, plus advanced performance built in: customizable Logitech RGB color lighting and lighting patterns, game mode button to disable Windows key and avoid accidental actuation, macros to execute complex commands in a single keystroke, 87 key anti-ghosting and 26-key rollover for precision control, and onboard memory to store your lighting configuration. This is the wired Logitech keyboard designed to give you the competitive edge.

products.title: Logitech G513 GX Blue Switch RGB Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
products.description: G513 is a high-performance gaming keyboard featuring your choice of advanced GX mechanical switches. The detachable, memory-foam palmrest and premium aluminum-alloy construction make G513 full-featured and best-in-class.

products.title: Logitech G815 LIGHTSYNC RGB Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
products.description: Advanced gaming technologies in a sophisticated ultra-thin design. Fully customizable, equipped with LIGHTSYNC RGB and dedicated G-keys. Engineered for high-performance gameplay with low-profile GL mechanical switches in clicky, tactile, and linear variations. Experience G815 and play the next dimension.

products.title: Keyboard HyperX Alloy Origins 60 QWERTY Red
products.description: The HyperX Alloy Origins™ 60 is a supremely portable 60% form factor keyboard that gives you more room for sweeping mouse movements. It features a durable, full aluminum body, and reliable HyperX switches balanced for speed and performance which are rated to withstand 80 million keypresses. The stock double shot PBT keycaps have secondary functions printed on them so you can quickly locate additional functionality. Let your style shine bright with the HyperX switches exposed LED design, and stunning lighting effects. Further customize your keyboard with macros, personalized lighting profiles, and more with HyperX NGENUITY software.

products.title: Keyboard HyperX Alloy Origins QWERTY RGB
products.description: The HyperX Alloy Origins™ is a compact, sturdy keyboard featuring custom HyperX mechanical switches designed to give gamers the best blend of style, performance, and reliability. These key switches have exposed LEDs for stunning lighting with an actuation force and travel distance elegantly balanced for responsiveness and accuracy. Alloy Origins is built with a full aluminum body so it stays rigid and stable when keystrokes are flying, and also features keyboard feet that let you choose from three different tilt levels. Its sleek, compact design frees up space for mouse movement, and it also features a detachable USB Type-C cable for supreme portability.

products.title: Logiteh G PRO Wireless Superlight
products.description: Less than 63 grams. Advanced low-latency LIGHTSPEED wireless. Sub-micron precision with HERO 25K sensor. Remove all obstacles with our lightest and fastest PRO mouse ever.

products.title: Logitech G Series Lightspeed G502
products.description: G502 Lightspeed features an advanced optical sensor for maximum tracking accuracy, customizable RGB lighting, custom game profiles, from 200 up to 25,600 DPI, and repositionable weights.

products.title: Logitech G Series Lightspeed G305
products.description: G305 is a LIGHTSPEED wireless gaming mouse designed for serious performance with latest technology innovations at an affordable price point. Now in a variety of vibrant colors.

products.title: Glorious Model D glossy black
products.description: The most comfortable ergonomic RGB gaming mouse. Packed with a full suite of ultra-premium features into an impossibly lightweight, ergonomic frame.

products.title: Glorious Model D Minus matte white
products.description: The most comfortable ergonomic RGB gaming mouse. Packed with a full suite of ultra-premium features into an impossibly lightweight, ergonomic frame.

products.title: Razer Basilisk X Hyperspeed
products.description: 25% faster than any other wireless technology available, you wont even realize that you are gaming with a wireless mouse due to its high-speed transmission, lowest click latency, and seamless frequency switching in the noisiest, data-saturated environments. As a benefit of its dual-mode design, you can also switch to its Bluetooth connection for extended battery life.

products.title: HyperX Pulsefire Haste
products.description: The HyperX Pulsefire Haste is built for elite gamers looking to gain every fraction of a second possible in their quest to be the best. Weighing in at 59 grams, this full-featured, responsive honeycomb shell mouse has everything you need, just without the extra weight. TTC Golden micro switches provide satisfying, reliable clicks and are rated for 60 million clicks, so you wont have to worry about missing inputs. The flexible HyperFlex USB cable and the virgin-grade PTFE skates work together to give you a smooth, easy glide to make dominating the game simple.

products.title: Blue Snowball Ice condenser white
products.description: Snowball iCE is the fastest and easiest way to get high-quality sound for recording and streaming. Powered by a custom cardioid condenser capsule, Snowball iCE provides crystal clear audio quality that's light years away from your computer's built-in microphone. It's even Skype certified, ensuring great sound results no matter how or when you use it—at home, in the office, or in the studio.

products.title: Hyperx Quadcast condenser
products.description: The HyperX QuadCast™ is the ideal all-inclusive standalone microphone for the aspiring streamer or podcaster looking for a condenser mic with quality sound. QuadCast comes with its own anti-vibration shock mount to help reduce the rumbles of daily life and a built-in pop filter to muffle pesky plosive sounds. Instantly know your mic status with the LED indicator, and simply tap-to-mute to avoid awkward broadcasting accidents. With four selectable polar patterns, this mics prepared for nearly any recording situation and also features a conveniently-located gain control dial to quickly adjust your mic input sensitivity. The included mount adapter fits 3/8” and 5/8” thread sizes and is compatible with most stands. The QuadCast S model provides RGB lighting and dynamic effects that are customizable through HyperX NGENUITY software.

products.title: Razer Seiren X condenser black
products.description: When it comes to communicating with your fans, friends or family, clarity is key. Whether you are a streamer looking to produce quality content, or someone who requires a solid video call setup for everyday communication, say it loud and clear with the Razer Seirēn X.

products.title: Razer Seiren Mini condenser white
products.description: Big sounds can come in small packages. Meet the Razer Seiren Mini—an ultra-compact condenser mic that's the perfect fit for professional grade-audio with any streaming or video call setup.

products.title: Shure SM7B Vocal Dynamic Microphone Black
products.description: Whether it is big-time broadcasting, professional podcasts or critical studio recordings, this legendary dynamic microphone delivers smooth, warm vocals every time. The SM7B captures and enhances the finer details of the human voice while blocking out all the distractions.

products.title: Hyperx Solocast Condenser Usb
products.description: For video editors, streamers, and gamers looking for a USB microphone with great sound quality, the HyperX SoloCast is a must have. It is Plug N Play, making it simple to use, with some of our fan-favorite conveniences like the tap-to-mute sensor and LED mute indicator. The versatile microphone has a flexible, adjustable stand and is also compatible with most boom arms, so it can either sit on your desk or work mounted. Certified by TeamSpeak and Discord and compatible with OBS, XSplit, Streamlabs OBS and a number of other programs, it is an extremely streamer-friendly microphone.

products.title: Blue Yeti condenser blackout
products.description: Create unparalleled recordings with your computer using Blue's best-selling family of Yeti USB microphones. Now with Blue VOICE software, you can craft the perfect broadcast vocal sound and entertain your stream audience with enhanced effects, advanced voice modulation and HD audio samples. Four different pickup patterns offer incredible flexibility so you can record vocals for music, podcasts, Twitch streaming, YouTube videos, or even cryptozoology lectures in ways that would normally require multiple microphones. Whether you're recording at home, on the road, or in the Himalayas, Yeti helps you produce studio-quality recordings every time.

products.title: SteelSeries Arctis 7 Wireless Gaming Headset
products.description: The SteelSeries Arctis 7 delivers lag-free 2.4GHz wireless audio with exceptional sound clarity and comfort. Designed for long gaming sessions with a lightweight steel-reinforced headband, ClearCast bidirectional microphone, and up to 24-hour battery life.

products.title: Gaming Headset Pro X
products.description: High-quality gaming headset with surround sound, noise-cancelling microphone, and comfortable ear cushions for long gaming sessions.
